message:
fix(extras): clear stale hyperlink metadata when painting over cells

apply_write_style() now resets the link_id on cells before applying the
new foreground/background colors.  Without this, text drawn over a cell
that previously carried a hyperlink would inherit the old link_id,
causing phantom hyperlinks in repainted regions.

The fix preserves existing style flags (e.g. UNDERLINE) while zeroing
out the link association.  A dedicated test verifies that draw_str
clears stale link metadata while keeping flags intact.

Also widens the confirm-dialog button-bounds test area from 8 to 15
columns to match the actual minimum width the dialog needs, preventing
a false negative after the narrow-layout changes in 5bd1a5b.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
